c74object.name: createproject
c74object.digest: Automates the creation of organized project folder structures from a master template
c74object.description:
The createproject object streamlines the process of starting new audio projects by enforcing a standardized directory hierarchy and automating the initial setup. When triggered, it creates a new directory at a specified destination and recursively copies the entire contents of a pre-defined project template into it.
Key Features:
Enforces project creation within a specific root directory (e.g., "[Projects]").
Recursively copies all template files and subdirectories.
Automatically updates the "Start In" (working directory) parameter of any copied shortcuts named "analyze_files.py - Shortcut" to match their new location, ensuring analysis tools function correctly from the start.
Includes a dedicated logging system for tracking the creation and copying process.

inlet.description: Accepts the full destination path for the new project as a symbol, or specific messages like 'create' to initiate the process.

outlet.description: Outputs detailed status messages, error reports, and confirmation of copied files when the log attribute is enabled.

method.name: create
method.description: Triggers the creation of the project at the specified path. The object will verify that the parent folder is named "[Projects]" before proceeding with the recursive copy of the template.

method.name: log
method.description: Sets the log attribute. When set to 1, all internal operations and errors are reported through the first outlet.

attribute.name: log
attribute.description: When enabled (1), the object provides granular feedback about every directory created and file copied through its outlet. Useful for debugging template structure or verifying successful project initialization.
